name: prixmaviz
description: Root-level marketplace manifest for the PrixmaViz plugin. Points at the plugin source at src-tauri/resources/plugin/. Used by Codex CLI and the simpler Claude Code install path (no subpath ref required).

plugins.name: prixmaviz
plugins.description: AI-native diagram tool — 28+ engines, annotations, infinite canvas. Renders to a browser tab via the hosted service or your own self-hosted PrixmaViz server.
